source_truth.role_note: Upstream early-signal monitor: emits pre-officialization public-interest signals that the parent hub (thehub-pr) discovers, validates, and aggregates; officialized matters hand off to moneysweep-pr.
source_truth.intake_doctrine: The seed ledger is synthetic and used only to exercise the export contract; production promotion requires real (non-synthetic) signal intake.

resolved_conditions: root federation.json manifest present and Hub-schema conformant
source registry and signal schema defined; CI manifest gate present
blocking_conditions: no real (non-synthetic) signal ledger yet; the seed ledger is synthetic and production export is refused until real intake exists
the parent hub (thehub-pr) must validate this producer's canonical package before live execution
